title: How did Lilith get on the cross
display_title: How did Lilith get on the cross
wikitext:
[]: How did Lilith get on the cross?             Quote Post by asuka_antics » Mon Mar 25, 2024 7:35 am I understand Rei put the spear in it in episode 14, but how did Lilith get up there in the first place? I doubt there's a concrete answer, but I'm just curious. I've always assumed Nerv just put it up there since it was already in the Geofront. But I dunno honestly.

[]: Re: How did Lilith get on the cross?             Quote Post by Anshin » Tue Mar 26, 2024 5:10 am Seele seem to be either direct descendants or inheritors of precursor race technologies, so them doing crazy things off panel is somewhat normal. I wouldn't even be surprised if, rather than putting it there, they simply grew the body right on a cross.

[]: Re: How did Lilith get on the cross?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Mar 26, 2024 7:24 am It was the Romans.

[]: Re: How did Lilith get on the cross?             Quote Post by VeryConfusedDingus » Thu Jun 13, 2024 2:52 pm That bugged me as well when I first saw it. Perhaps Lillith grows on a cross? There's probably some esoteric symbolic meaning to it.

[]: Re: How did Lilith get on the cross?             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jun 14, 2024 11:46 am I just assumed NERV did it for whatever reason. Sketches of the creation of Unit 01, back when it was connected to Lilith, show them both seemingly laying on the ground, so maybe they hoisted her up for easier containment/LCL collection/whatever.

[]: Re: How did Lilith get on the cross?             Quote Post by Clowncarcrash » Sun Jul 07, 2024 2:03 am idk, they build, maintain, and manufacture EVA units and Lilith isn't that bigger than those units... they probably have some crazy powerful cranes and pullies down there. Seeing how they have skyscrapers that withdraw into the ground i don't think thats the most impressive feat of engineering in the Evangelion world.
